nodes.name: Change Profile Page
nodes.summary: Two-step profile change page with identity verification and profile editing for FPS dealers

nodes.name: ChangeProfilePage
nodes.summary: Default export — renders auth verification step then profile edit form

nodes.name: handleAuth
nodes.summary: Authenticates user with FPS ID and password via API, transitions to edit step

nodes.name: handleSave
nodes.summary: Saves profile updates via PATCH /dealers/:id

nodes.name: Forgot Password Page
nodes.summary: Forgot password request page that sends OTP to registered mobile

nodes.name: ForgotPasswordPage
nodes.summary: Default export — renders forgot password form with FPS ID and mobile fields

nodes.name: handleSubmit (forgot)
nodes.summary: Submits forgot password request and navigates to OTP verification

nodes.name: Login Page
nodes.summary: Login page with password show/hide, auth context integration, and redirect to dashboard

nodes.name: LoginPage
nodes.summary: Default export — renders login form with auth context and redirect logic

nodes.name: handleSubmit (login)
nodes.summary: Handles login form submission via auth context login method

nodes.name: Password Success Page
nodes.summary: Success page shown after password reset with link to login

nodes.name: PasswordSuccessPage
nodes.summary: Default export — renders success confirmation with link to login page

nodes.name: Register Page
nodes.summary: Multi-step registration with FPS lookup, profile details, eFPS sync option, and password creation

nodes.name: RegisterPage
nodes.summary: Default export — multi-step registration form with 5-step wizard

nodes.name: handleVerify
nodes.summary: Looks up FPS ID via /dealers/lookup API

nodes.name: canProceedFromStep
nodes.summary: Validates current step fields before allowing progression

nodes.name: handleSubmit (register)
nodes.summary: Submits registration via /dealers/register API

nodes.name: PasswordStrength
nodes.summary: Renders a 5-segment password strength indicator

nodes.name: Set Password Page
nodes.summary: Password reset page with token from sessionStorage and password strength validation

nodes.name: SetPasswordForm
nodes.summary: Inner form component that handles password reset with token validation

nodes.name: SetPasswordPage
nodes.summary: Default export — wraps SetPasswordForm in Suspense for useSearchParams

nodes.name: Verify Identity Page
nodes.summary: Identity verification page that authenticates user and redirects to change profile

nodes.name: VerifyIdentityPage
nodes.summary: Default export — renders identity verification form with auth context login

nodes.name: UserIcon
nodes.summary: Inline SVG user icon component

nodes.summary: Layout wrapper for auth pages with centered card and gradient background

nodes.name: AuthLayout
nodes.summary: Default export — renders centered card container with subtle gradient background

nodes.summary: Renders a live status chip with status dot and label
